ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, end-user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the interval (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "interval_length" INTEGER /* Length of the interval */,
  "interval_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the interval (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry of energy data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Energy consumed in watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage level during the measurement */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in amps */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor indicating the efficiency of the electrical system */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or label associated with the entry */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the session or testing period */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the devices table */,
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data_collection_intervals table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the devices table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data in JSON or XML format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "generation_time" TEXT /* Time the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboard_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout settings in JSON format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., administrator, analyst, end-user) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id")
)
